name: Cai Yan

skills.name: Can't Touch This
skills.description: Periodic Passive Effect: Recovers Health and gains Movement Speed when taking damage.

skills.name: Healing Hymn
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed and continuously heals teammates within a certain range.

skills.name: Earworm
skills.description:
Fires a sound wave in the target direction, stunning and damaging enemies hit.
Sound waves bounce between nearby enemies.

skills.name: Tune of Tranquility
skills.description: Continuously heals the teammate with the lowest Health within range, while granting them Physical and Magical Defense.

skillsZh.name: 長歌行
skillsZh.description: 每隔一段時間獲得被動效果：受到傷害時回復生命並獲得加速效果。

skillsZh.name: 思無邪
skillsZh.description: 蔡文姬獲得加速，並持續治療自身周圍一定範圍內友方英雄。

skillsZh.name: 胡笳樂
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向發射音波，對命中敵人造成傷害和暈眩。
音波會在附近敵人之間彈射。

skillsZh.name: 忘憂曲
skillsZh.description: 持續治療自身周圍一定範圍內生命最低的友方英雄，受到治療的英雄會提升雙抗。

tips: Cai Yan (Support): Tier S — 50.82% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Augur's Word.
tipsZh: 蔡文姬（遊走）：梯度 S，勝率 50.82%（Camp HOK）。

patchHistory.change: Increased the recovery from Cai Yan's Skill 1 and Ultimate, and increased the defense provided by the Ultimate during late-game.
patchHistory.detail: Cai Yan provides great sustain and protection for her teammates as long as she can afford equipment, but she becomes less useful when her team is falling behind. To alleviate this, we increased her recovery effects and the defense provided by her Ultimate, so that she can be effective even before she has a lot of equipment.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升蔡文姬1技能和大招的恢復效果，進一步提升大招在後期所提供的防禦屬性
patchHistoryZh.detail: 蔡文姬在獲取裝備優勢後可以為團隊提供不錯的持續作戰能力和保護能力，但是在某些處境不那麼樂觀的對局就很難發揮她應有的作用。我們提升了蔡文姬的恢復效果和大招提供的防禦屬性，確保她可以在尚未獲得大量裝備情況下也能發揮應有的作用。

faqs.question: Is Cai Yan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Cai Yan is Tier S Support with 50.82% win rate, 1.13% pick rate, and 1.55% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Cai Yan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Augur's Word, Venomous Staff, Splendor, Data unavailable.

faqs.question: How to counter Cai Yan?
faqs.answer: Pick Gao Changgong, Mulan. Strong into Diaochan, Arke.

faqsZh.question: 蔡文姬 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 蔡文姬 為 S 梯度，勝率 50.82%、選取 1.13%、禁用 1.55%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 蔡文姬 出裝怎麼搭配？
怎麼克制 蔡文姬？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Gao Changgong、Mulan。蔡文姬 克制 Diaochan、Arke。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Arke. Weak into: Gao Changgong, Mulan.

guide.overview: Cai Yan is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.3% win rate and 1.3% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Cai Yan: Periodic Passive Effect: Restores Health and gains a Movement Speedbonus when taking damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Augur's Word, then complete Venomous Staff, Splendor. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Cai Yan's Support kit. Take Smite & Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Healing Hymn → Earworm → Tune of Tranquility → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Tune of Tranquility (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Healing Hymn, and Tune of Tranquility on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Healing Hymn → Earworm → Tune of Tranquility → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Cai Yan is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.9% — expect Cai Yan to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Cai Yan vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Cai Yan has +4.3% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Cai Yan when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Cai Yan vs Yaria (Support, Tier S): Yaria is 1.1% pick / 48.0% WR. Cai Yan has +2.3% WR vs Yaria in Camp data. Choose Cai Yan when you need Roaming identity; choose Yaria for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Cai Yan excels into Diaochan, Arke. Avoid blind picking into Gao Changgong, Mulan without team peel.
